propositions: Documents rebar's security assurance model targeting FISMA Moderate, where certification means process-followed with no blocking issues, not a correctness guarantee.
Frames five security assessment findings (L1-L5) as accepted limitations, each with a bounding control and authority tier rather than unmitigated threats.
Includes a prior-art/benchmark comparison against gittuf, TUF, Sigstore, in-toto/SLSA, RFC 8725, and NIST SSDF/800-53.
References tracked deferred-hardening idea tickets 2422, 4e1d, and 5100.
Adopts the numbered/cross-referenceable accepted/superseded ADR lifecycle used by ADRs 0044 and 0045.
